issues.issue: Property statments are allowed only in component annexes
left side of binary expression '=>' is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool'
left and right sides of binary expression '<=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type
left and right sides of binary expression '<=' are of type 'int' and '<error>', but must be of the same type
left side of binary expression '<=' is of type '<error>' but must be of type'int' or 'real'
right side of binary expression '<=' is of type '<error>' but must be of type'int' or 'real'
